description: PET film single-coated PSA tape for eyeglass lens edging. Rikipad TP-7574 was developed as fixing material for edging eyeglass lens. The Riki Pad is a PREMIUM GRADE Intermediary Film Pad (IFP) that reduces slippage while edging Hydrophobic-Coated Lenses. The Riki Pad is a TOP-PERFORMING pad that adheres to all slick top coatings. This unique adhesive found on the Riki Pad, bonds so effectively because it was created by the makers of Hydrophobic Coating. The adhesive side of the clear, thin Riki Film Pad is placed on the lens surface, and the Blocking Pad is attached on top of the IFP. After edging, removing the Riki Pad is EASY and clean. Using the Riki Pad / Intermediary Film Pad has proven to be the most effective way to protect your expensive lenses.

PET film single-coated PSA tape for eyeglass lens edging. Rikipad TP-7574 was developed as fixing material for edging eyeglass lens. The Riki Pad is a PREMIUM GRADE Intermediary Film Pad (IFP) that reduces slippage while edging Hydrophobic-Coated Lenses. The Riki Pad is a TOP-PERFORMING pad that adheres to all slick top coatings. This unique adhesive found on the Riki Pad, bonds so effectively because it was created by the makers of Hydrophobic Coating. The adhesive side of the clear, thin Riki Film Pad is placed on the lens surface, and the Blocking Pad is attached on top of the IFP. After edging, removing the Riki Pad is EASY and clean. Using the Riki Pad / Intermediary Film Pad has proven to be the most effective way to protect your expensive lenses.

Single step edge blocking. This hydrophobic-specific blocking pad uses a reinforcing layer designed so that the product will not twist during edging. This reduces the possibility of axis slippage and the expense related to those lost jobs.  The proprietary adhesive technology used allows the product to be removed cleanly from the lens after use to allow users to stock just one blocking pad for all jobs.
Linerless masking tape for eyeglass lens polishing
Z-117 is a hard coating varnish developed for high RI opthalmic lenses with an RI of between 1.57-1.61. Its main component is thermoset silicone resin.
LH-3 (H-type) is a hard coating varnish developed for medium RI opthalmic lenses with an RI of between 1.57-1.61. Its main component is thermoset silicone resin.
This fluorine coating material repel water and oily residues. Benefits: Lowers adhesion of contaminants, improves ease of contaminant removal, protects against scratches, etc.
This fluorine coating material repel water and oily residues. Benefits: Lowers adhesion of contaminants, improves ease of contaminant removal, protects against scratches, etc.

This is a fluorine-free coating that enables easy water removal.
In response to social demand, we have developed a coating material that does not utilize fluorine (PFAS).
A series of silicone tapes, especially developed for high refractive lens molding. Silicone adhesive. Film is PET.
A series of silicone tapes, especially developed for high refractive lens molding. Acrylic adhesive. Film is OPP
